title: Black Market Babies
writer: George Maurice, Virginia Reid, George Wallace Sayre
actors: Ralph Morgan, Kane Richmond, Jayne Hazard
plot: This George Morris story was based on an article that appeared in "Woman's Home Companion" and later reprinted in "Reader's Digest." Eddie Condon, a two-bit racketeer, teams up with an alcoholic doctor, Judson, to set up a materni...
